category_sources: Official protolint README describes linting and fixing Protocol Buffer files.
source_facts.description says protolint is a pluggable linter and fixer for Protocol Buffer style and conventions.
docs_sources: Official protolint README documents installation, usage, and integration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/yoheimuta/protolint, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official protolint README says it helps follow the official Protocol Buffers style guide.
source_facts.description identifies linting and fixing for Protocol Buffer style and conventions.
